## Summary

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:open:full`
- [ ] `npm run verify:open-source-boundary`
- [ ] `npm run build:open`

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept private cloud endpoints, auth/session flows, private deployment hostnames, and private server imports out of the open repository.
- [ ] I preserved the first-party plugin trust model or documented why a plugin-runtime change is safe.
- [ ] I updated tests or docs for public API, plugin helper, runtime flag, packaging, or behavior changes.
- [ ] I redacted secrets, cookies, local profile data, tokens, and private logs from screenshots or pasted output.
